message:
fix(distributed): regenerate test TLS certificates with 10-year validity

The previous test certificates expired 2026-03-02, causing distributed module
test failures. Regenerated all four PEM constants (CA_CERT, SERVER_CERT,
SERVER_KEY, CLIENT_CERT, CLIENT_KEY) with certificates valid until 2036-03-18.
Also reformatted the PEM constants from single-line escaped newlines to
multi-line string literals for improved readability and diff-friendliness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     use std::time::Duration;
